allow: Bash(node -e "const {DatabaseSync} = require\('node:sqlite'\); const db = new DatabaseSync\('pisotab.db'\); console.log\('ACTIVE SESSIONS:', JSON.stringify\(db.prepare\(\\"SELECT id,device_id,status,time_remaining_secs FROM sessions WHERE status IN \('active','paused'\)\\"\).all\(\), null, 2\)\);")
